rulings.Case Title: CAITLIN FITTING et al VS. PAUL KRAAIJVANGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Stay Allproceedings, Pending Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday May 23, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT PAUL KRAAIJVANGER Notice Of Motion To Stay All proceedings, Pending Appeal is off calendar per CCP 1005. No OST and duplicative June 13, 2016. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FARHAD ZAGHI VS. CECELIA KENNEDY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Relief From Summary Judgment Entered On Nov 16, 15
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday May 23, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT CECELIA KENNEDY Notice Of Motion For Relief From Summary Judgment Entered On November 16, 2015 is DENIED. Defendant failed to meet CCP 473(b) and CCP 1008 was denied February 2016. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUAN YANG WU VS. TIM WONG
